dashboard.focusCueBlockers_one: {{count}} resource is blocked — check IAM permissions.
dashboard.focusCueBlockers_other: {{count}} resources are blocked — check IAM permissions.
dashboard.focueCueStaleOnly_one: {{count}} resource is stale. Hit Refresh to update.
dashboard.focueCueStaleOnly_other: {{count}} resources are stale. Hit Refresh to update.
dashboard.focusCueNoData: Waiting for Brain to analyse resources — they will show as stale until the first scan.
dashboard.resourceStatusDescription: Single source of truth for live infrastructure checks and blockers.

emptyState.title: No resources to monitor yet
emptyState.description: Add AWS resources to your watchlist and Aura will start tracking their permissions, status, and health in real time.

resourceWatchlist.title: Resource Watchlist
resourceWatchlist.subtitle: Choose the AWS resources and actions you want to monitor. Changes take effect after saving.

emptyState.title: Your watchlist is empty
emptyState.description: Pick an AWS resource from the selector or paste a JSON config — Aura will start monitoring it the moment you save.

resourceWatchlist.saveError: Failed to save watchlist. Please try again.
resourceWatchlist.jsonParseError: Invalid JSON — fix the syntax to sync changes

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Start monitoring your AWS infrastructure in minutes.
signUp.companySlugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens allowed
signUp.tooltipAvailable: Handle available — your team's sign-up link will be aura-cloud.com/{{slug}}
signUp.tooltipTaken: Handle already in use — choose a different one so your team gets a unique link
signUp.tooltipInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens are allowed — no spaces or special characters

companyLanding.subtitle: Sign up to monitor your AWS infrastructure.
companyLanding.notFound: Company not found. Check the URL and try again.

companySignUp.title: Join your team
companySignUp.subtitle: Create your account to start monitoring your AWS resources.

selectAwsUser.title: Select your AWS identity
selectAwsUser.subtitle: Choose the IAM or SSO user that matches your AWS account.
selectAwsUser.fetchError: Could not load AWS users. Try again later.
selectAwsUser.noUsers: No AWS users found yet. Your manager may need to complete AWS onboarding first.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Aura Cloud account.

onboard.title: Connect your AWS account
onboard.subtitle: Aura needs read-only access to your AWS account to start monitoring your infrastructure.
onboard.step1Description: Click the button below to open AWS CloudFormation. It will deploy a read-only IAM role in your account and generate the credentials you need.
onboard.step2Description: Once the stack is deployed, copy the Access Key ID and Secret Access Key from the CloudFormation outputs and paste them below.
onboard.successDescription: Your AWS account is now linked. Taking you to your dashboard...

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and AWS connection.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your personal and company information.

invite.title: Team Invite
invite.description: Share the code and sign-up link with your team so they can join your workspace.
invite.hint: Employees need both the sign-up link and the invite code to create their account.

aws.title: AWS Credentials
aws.description: Rotate your AWS access keys. Enter new credentials and save to update.
